overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy ascending a snowy mountain path, pausing at a summit overlook with panoramic mountain views, then traversing a ridge with tribal banners to approach a dark cave entrance with glowing blue technological elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ascent with wooden log stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up steep wooden stairs carved into the snowy mountainside

entered.detail: futuristic blue glowing technological structure embedded in rocks
weathered wooden staircase ascending the mountain slope
dark rocky cliff face covered in snow
bare deciduous tree with twisted branches against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep wooden staircase winding through a narrow snowy mountain pass, flanked by snow-covered rock walls and sparse leafless trees, with a mysterious blue glowing structure visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain summit overlook with panoramic valley views

events.description: emerges from narrow mountain path onto open summit with expansive vista
character stops walking to observe the panoramic mountain valley view

agents.ego_description: standing at the summit edge surveying the vast snowy mountain range and misty valley below

entered.detail: expansive view of snow-covered mountain peaks shrouded in mist
deep valley filled with snow and scattered evergreen trees
jagged mountain summits visible through atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: Reaching the summit, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of snow-covered mountains and valleys shrouded in mist. The character pauses to survey the landscape, with distant peaks visible under a bright sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge path with colorful tribal banners

events.description: turns away from vista and continues along narrow mountain ridge path

agents.ego_description: traversing the snowy ridge path past colorful tribal banners and wooden scaffolding

entered.detail: large fabric banner with blue and orange geometric patterns hanging from wooden poles
rustic wooden structure with ropes and beams supporting the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns from the overlook and proceeds along a narrow ridge path lined with colorful tribal banners and wooden scaffolding, with snow-covered rocks and sparse trees surrounding the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark cave entrance with icicles and glowing blue lights

events.description: approaching dark cave entrance framed by hanging icicles
ambient light decreases as character approaches shadowy cave interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the dark cave entrance with glowing blue technological lights visible inside

entered.detail: dark opening in the rock face leading into the mountain interior
long translucent ice formations hanging from the cave entrance ceiling
mysterious cyan technological lights emanating from within the cave

segments.scene_description: The path leads toward a dark cave entrance framed by hanging icicles, with mysterious blue glowing lights emanating from within the cavern, signaling a transition from the bright exterior to the shadowy interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends a steep mountain pass and culminates in an approach toward a mysterious, glowing cavern. It begins with the character climbing a winding wooden staircase through a narrow snowy corridor of rock walls and leafless trees, passing a blue glowing structure. As the climb concludes, the scene opens into a breathtaking panoramic summit where the character pauses to survey mist-shrouded valleys and distant peaks under a bright sky. The camera then follows the character away from the overlook and along a narrow ridge lined with colorful tribal banners and wooden scaffolding. Finally, the path leads toward a dark cave entrance framed by hanging icicles, where the bright exterior light shifts into a shadowy interior illuminated by emanating blue lights.
